{{Quote|A ragtag fleet of Rebel starships, led by Captain Raymus Antilles in his specially designed flagship, the SUNDERED HEART, moves into formation for the assault....|[[Opening crawl]] for ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''|<ref name="EAW" />}}
The '''Vanguard c20 retrofit suite''' was an aftermarket upgrade provided by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]].

==Description==
[[File:Retrofitted_corvette_1.jpg|thumb|left|145px|Rear view of a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] modified with the Vanguard c20 retrofit suite]]
The Vanguard c20 retrofit suite was meant to bring the [[CR70 corvette/Legends|CR70 corvette]] up to date technologically with the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]]. It enhanced the combat prowess of the [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] and ensured that the CR70 remained on par with the CR90. This modification essentially transformed the CR70 corvette into a CR90 model.<ref name="SOTG" />

Trained [[Technician/Legends|professionals]] usually took 2 to 3 [[Standard week/Legends|weeks]] of work to install the Vanguard c20 retrofit suite.<ref name="SOTG" /> The modification added several [[Meter/Legends|meters]] to the [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] length and added a secondary boarding ramp near the [[Engine/Legends|engine]] block.<ref name="EAW" />

==History==
When the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]] began producing the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] as its standard, rather than as an upgrade for the unarmed [[CR70 corvette/Legends|CR70 corvette]], current owners of CR70 models were given the option of purchasing this aftermarket modification suite.<ref name="SOTG" />

[[File:Sundered-Heart.jpg|thumb|right|170px|The [[Sundered Heart/Legends|''Sundered Heart'']] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]]]
Some time after the [[Declaration of a New Order]], the [[Sundered Heart/Legends|''Sundered Heart'']] was upgraded, under the supervision of [[Master chief petty officer|Master Petty Officer]] [[Corla Metonae/Legends|Corla Metonae]], with the Vanguard c20 retrofit suite. It added considerable armor, better sensor capacity and weapon systems, bringing the ship in line with the weapons-laden CR90 [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]].<ref name="RR">{{InsiderCite|90|Refresher Reading}}</ref> The enhanced ''Sundered Heart'' was later [[Space Battle at Kuat|used]] [[Space Battle in the Kessel Asteroid Field|in]] [[Raid above Corellia|several]] [[Raid over Corulag|battles]] [[Battle at Atzerri|of]] the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], with [[Raymus Antilles/Legends|Raymus Antilles]] as its [[Captain/Legends|captain]].<ref name="EAW" />

In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], several other [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] corvettes, modified with this equipment, were used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Battle of Arrochar|battle]] of [[Arrochar]].<ref name="SW18">[[Star Wars (2013) 18|''Star Wars'' (2013) 18]]</ref>
